system.range: Self or 5 metres x Psy Rating
system.effect: The psyker clouds the minds of those around him, causing them to be unable to perceive the target. The target becomes effectively invisible to all creatures within range, gaining a +30 bonus to Stealth tests and cannot be targeted by attacks unless the attacker has some means of detecting the invisible.

description.value: The psyker reaches into the minds of all nearby creatures and simply removes himself or another target from their perception. The target is not truly invisible -- the psyker merely prevents others from noticing them. The target gains a +30 bonus to Stealth tests and cannot be directly targeted by attacks while the power is sustained. Attacking or performing other violent actions may break the effect, requiring a new Focus Power test.
